def negative_pydantic_model_validate_after_json_loads():
    rule_id = "pydantic_model_validate_after_json_loads"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Pydantic v2 validation is preceded by json.loads(...) even though model_validate_json() could validate raw JSON directly."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
